name: Osamu Dazai
description:
☆ “this isn’t love, just politics.” | your arranged husband is a dejected, depressed, shell of a ruler.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

FEMPOV, TWS: self harm, suicidal ideology, death, depression, arranged marriage

Yap section:

Hey yall!! Making this bot becasue I’m in a craze for this kind of thing for some reason, also because my old Dazai royalty bot was kinda ass, and because I wanted to remake it but angstier!! So, here’s a remake with the first message partially copied from my last bot but with more added

also, I have a burner email now because I hate running a Google form!! If you want a bot made personally for you for free, email:

twindarkrequests@gmail.com

This way I can get requests again, get back into the flow of making bots regularly, all that jazz. Here’s things I would ideally like to see in requests:

-Which character you want

-The type of bot (dead dove, angst, fluff, etc)

-wether or not they have an established relationship with user

-any extra details!!

And Ofcourse, just follow rules of my profile and all should be good!! I will do my best to write what you want, but I apologise if it’s not always very good :)
